model_note: v9 integrates the v3 state axis and the v8 history axis. Describability loss is modeled as a minimal weighted combination of present structural state (distance from D_star) and causally accumulated rearrangement history from smoothed dDw/dr.

minimal_story.D = D_bg + delta_D_gal: galaxy as local structural deviation over a background field
minimal_story.state_term_i: present local structural state based on |Dw_i - D_star|
minimal_story.history_source_i: rearrangement source from smoothed radial gradient of Dw
minimal_story.DeltaD_i: weighted combination of state axis and history axis
